reference: Hello, I had my premolars taken out two days ago for my braces, and my dimple on the right cheek has disappeared. If I apply pressure on that cheek, I feel a little bit of pain, and when I smile, my right cheek feels swollen. So, when I smile, my left dimple shows, but on my right cheek, I can see a little bump instead of a dent. Please help me!
text: Hello, I had my premolars taken out two days ago for my braces, and my dimple on the right cheek has disappeared. If I apply pressure on that cheek, I feel a little bit of pain, and when I smile, my right cheek feels swollen. So when I smile, my left dimple shows, but on my right cheek, I can see a little instead of a dimple. Please help me.
